Waiting for extension badges… (reload once extension is active)
Recall — AI detected
—
TP / total AI
False positive rate
—
FP / total real
Precision
—
TP / (TP + FP)
F1 Score
—
harmonic mean prec × recall

Grok / Aurora via X CDN (48 images — all AI, no metadata, pixel-only)
